text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spring—the season of the Classics has arrived. I
draft a plan of what races we'll take on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, we watch some videos of races
featuring Triple Crown champion Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While watching Narita Brian race, I think about
how unfortunate it is that Mayano Top Gun
doesn't have such a rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I can't stop watching the videos of
Narita Brian. Mayano Top Gun becomes jealous
and yells at me to keep my eyes on her and her
alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then sets a goal of defeating Narita Brian in a
legitimate race with the apparent intention of
keeping my attention all for herself.
